outcome_summary: WP-06 converged tracked evidence, bounded review synthesis, and signed trace proof into a durable C-SDLC transition packet.
outcome_facts: The evidence bundle is tracked under docs/milestones/v0.91.4/review/evidence/csdlc/.
The review synthesis preserves findings, dispositions, and residual risks in tracked JSON.
The signed trace fixture verifies with the tracked public key rather than local-only scratch state.
